mapper.select: SELECT task_id, project_id, parent_task_id, wbs_color, task_title FROM schedule_task WHERE task_id = #{task_id}

SELECT c.comment_id, c.task_id, c.parent_comment_id, c.created_by_user_id, t.project_id FROM schedule_task_comment c INNER JOIN schedule_task t ON t.task_id = c.task_id WHERE c.comment_id = #{comment_id}
SELECT project_id, project_type_code, project_name, origin_address FROM schedule_project WHERE project_id = #{project_id}
SELECT task_id, project_id, parent_task_id, wbs_color, task_title FROM schedule_task WHERE project_id = #{project_id}

SELECT c.comment_id, c.task_id, c.parent_comment_id, c.comment_content, c.created_by_user_id, c.created_by_user_nm, c.created_at, c.updated_at, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM schedule_task_comment reply WHERE reply.parent_comment_id = c.comment_id ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS has_reply FROM schedule_task_comment c INNER JOIN schedule_task t ON t.task_id = c.task_id INNER JOIN schedule_project p ON p.project_id = t.project_id
AND c.task_id = #{task_id}
AND ( p.owner_user_id = #{viewer_user_id} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM schedule_project_member pm WHERE pm.project_id = p.project_id AND pm.user_id = #{viewer_user_id} ) )
ORDER BY COALESCE(c.parent_comment_id, c.comment_id), CASE WHEN c.parent_comment_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, c.created_at, c.comment_id
mapper.update: SELECT setval( pg_get_serial_sequence('schedule_task', 'task_id'), COALESCE((SELECT MAX(task_id) FROM schedule_task), 0) + 1, false )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule_task ( project_id, parent_task_id, task_type_code, task_title, task_status, priority, assignee_user_id, start_date, due_date, actual_start_date, actual_end_date, task_url, support_amount, actual_amount, progress_rate, wbs_color, description ) VALUES ( #{project_id}, #{parent_task_id}, #{task_type_code}, #{task_title}, #{task_status}, #{priority}, #{assignee_user_id}, CAST(#{start_date} AS DATE), CAST(#{due_date} AS DATE), CAST(#{actual_start_date} AS DATE), CAST(#{actual_end_date} AS DATE), #{task_url}, #{support_amount}, #{actual_amount}, #{progress_rate}, #{wbs_color}, #{description} )
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule_task SET project_id = #{project_id}, parent_task_id = #{parent_task_id}, task_type_code = #{task_type_code}, task_title = #{task_title}, task_status = #{task_status}, priority = #{priority}, assignee_user_id = #{assignee_user_id}, start_date = CAST(#{start_date} AS DATE), due_date = CAST(#{due_date} AS DATE), actual_start_date = CAST(#{actual_start_date} AS DATE), actual_end_date = CAST(#{actual_end_date} AS DATE), task_url = #{task_url}, support_amount = #{support_amount}, actual_amount = #{actual_amount}, progress_rate = #{progress_rate}, wbs_color = #{wbs_color}, description = #{description}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE task_id = #{task_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule_task_comment ( task_id, parent_comment_id, comment_content, created_by_user_id, created_by_user_nm ) VALUES ( #{task_id}, #{parent_comment_id}, #{comment_content}, #{created_by_user_id}, #{created_by_user_nm} )
